scripts.bootstrap: pnpm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/cli.js bootstrap
scripts.validate: pnpm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/cli.js validate
scripts.smoke: pnpm run bootstrap && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag smoke
scripts.contracts: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag regression
scripts.runtime: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag runtime
scripts.delegate: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag delegate
scripts.profiling: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag profiling
scripts.bridge: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag bridge
scripts.interaction: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag interaction
scripts.hardening: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag hardening
scripts.ecosystem: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag ecosystem
scripts.native-build: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag native-build
scripts.stable: pnpm run smoke && pnpm run contracts && pnpm run hardening && pnpm run delegate && pnpm run runtime && pnpm run profiling && pnpm run bridge
scripts.beta: pnpm run smoke && pnpm run contracts && pnpm run hardening && pnpm run ecosystem && pnpm run delegate && pnpm run runtime && pnpm run profiling && pnpm run bridge && pnpm run interaction && pnpm run native-build
scripts.qa: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate && pnpm run run -- --tag edge && pnpm run run -- --tag adversarial
